_comment: Optional overrides for the fake price provider. Point PRICETRACKER_FAKE_FIXTURES_PATH at a copy of this file. Keys are product external IDs (Amazon ASIN or eBay item ID). Prices are in MINOR units (e.g. cents). Provide either a fixed 'price' or a 'prices' series consumed one entry per check (settling on the last value). Products not listed here fall back to the built-in deterministic oscillation. NOTE: keys starting with '_' are ignored because they carry neither 'price' nor 'prices'.

B00EXAMPLE1.title: Demo Widget (drops to target on the 4th check)
